title: Three Cups Left Warm
originalityStatement: An original domestic drama benchmark; its characters, apartment, chronology, and conflicts were created for selector testing.

storyModel.premise: An adult child returns to a small apartment and reconstructs a family decision by noticing how two relatives change their routines and use of shared objects.
storyModel.playerRole: Returning family member who lacks the final decision’s context
protectedCanon: The decision is disclosed by the elder only after the player understands both routines

productProfile.spatialBudget: one apartment across three schedule windows
